docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-01-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS 506 PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES MULLARNEY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
